_publications._publicationTitle: Neuronal hyperexcitability drives central and peripheral nervous system tumor progression in models of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: proliferative indices (5.9% Ki67+ cells)...proliferative index (Nf1 f/1809 ; hGFAP-Cre, 0.8%; CTL, 1.03 Ki67+ cells)
details: Successfully detected proliferative cells in optic nerves and DRGs, showing 0.8% Ki67+ cells in Nf1 f/1809 ; hGFAP-Cre mice vs 5.9% in Nf1-OPG mice
